phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Capela de São Bartolomeu is
phrases.text_local: Onde localizo a Capela de São Bartolomeu?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee lo-ka-LEE-zoo ah ka-PEH-lah jee-SAO bar-to-lo-MEH-oo?
phrases.cultural_note: Capelas históricas pontuam o circuito murado com valor patrimonial.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica perto do miradouro.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh PEHR-too DOO mee-ruh-DOHW-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is near the viewpoint.

responses.english: Good morning, it is near the viewpoint.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh PEHR-too DOO mee-ruh-DOHW-roo.
responses.french: Bom dia, fica perto do miradouro.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket booth is
phrases.cultural_note: Acesso controlado garante a preservação do monumento nacional.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na entrada principal do recinto.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL DOO reh-SEEN-too.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the main entrance of the site.

responses.english: Good morning, at the main entrance of the site.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL DOO reh-SEEN-too.
responses.french: Bom dia, na entrada principal do recinto.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the São Martinho Tower is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Torre de São Martinho?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH TAW-rih DIH SOWN muh-ruh-TEE-nyoo?
phrases.cultural_note: Torres defensivas marcam os pontos estratégicos da muralha.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao vigia ou ao guia turístico.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vee-ZHEEUH OHW OW GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the wall monitor or the tour guide.

responses.english: Ask the wall monitor or the tour guide.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vee-ZHEEUH OHW OW GEEUH too-REESH-tee-koo.
responses.french: Pergunte ao vigia ou ao guia turístico.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Capela de São Bartolomeu is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Capela de São Bartolomeu?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH kuh-PEH-luh DIH SOWN buh-ruh-too-loo-MEHOO?
phrases.cultural_note: Capela de São Bartolomeu is a small historic chapel located along the wall walkway in Óbidos, often visited during the route.

likely_response.local: Fica ao longo do Caminho de Ronda.
likely_response.pronunciation: FEE-kuh OW LOHNG-goo DOO kuh-MEE-nyoo DIH ROHNG-duh.

responses.phonetic: FEE-kuh OW LOHNG-goo DOO kuh-MEE-nyoo DIH ROHNG-duh.
responses.french: Fica ao longo do Caminho de Ronda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the audio guide rental is
phrases.text_local: Onde posso alugar o guia de áudio?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo uh-loo-GAHR AW GEEUH DIH OW-deeoo?
phrases.cultural_note: Guias digitais complementam a visita autoguiada com contexto histórico.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar bilhetes para a muralha?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR bee-LYEH-tihsh PUH-ruh AH moo-RAH-lyuh?

likely_response.local: Dirija-se à bilheteira na entrada principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh NUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the ticket booth at the main entrance.

responses.english: Go to the ticket booth at the main entrance.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh NUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.french: Dirija-se à bilheteira na entrada principal.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar bilhetes para a muralha?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR bee-LYEH-tihsh PUH-ruh AH moo-RAH-lyuh?

likely_response.local: Dirija-se à bilheteira na entrada principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh NUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the ticket booth at the main entrance.

responses.english: Go to the ticket booth at the main entrance.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh NUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.french: Dirija-se à bilheteira na entrada principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket booth is
phrases.text_local: Com licença, onde fica a bilheteira?
phrases.pronunciation: KOHM lee-SAYNG-suh, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: At Óbidos walls, the ticket booth is located at the main entrance (Porta da Vila). It's common to buy a combined ticket for the wall walk and the castle.

likely_response.translation_en: At the main entrance, on the right.

responses.english: At the main entrance, on the right.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Pombal viewpoint is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o miradouro do Pombal?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO poom-BAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: Miradouros são paragens essenciais para registar a paisagem urbana.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no extremo sul do caminho.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO ehst-REH-moo SOOW DOO kuh-MEE-nyoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the southern end of the path.

responses.english: Good morning, at the southern end of the path.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO ehst-REH-moo SOOW DOO kuh-MEE-nyoo.
responses.french: Bom dia, no extremo sul do caminho.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Torre de São Martinho is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Torre de São Martinho?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH TAW-rih DIH SOWN muh-ruh-TEE-nyoo?
phrases.cultural_note: Torres medievais servem como pontos de referência visuais no percurso.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao vigia ou siga as placas.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vee-ZHEEUH OHW SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the wall monitor or follow the signs.

responses.english: Ask the wall monitor or follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vee-ZHEEUH OHW SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh.
responses.french: Pergunte ao vigia ou siga as placas.
